tech_news.title: Xbox is getting over 40 new games next week - TrueAchievements
tech_news.description: Next week, another wave of 43 Xbox games will arrive on the platform, including Screamer, Life is Strange: Reunion, and Project Songbird.

tech_news.title: Xbox sale round-up March 24, 2026 - TrueAchievements
tech_news.description: New Xbox sales are now live, with big discounts on Minecraft Dungeons, Sunset Overdrive, Borderlands 2, Bully: Scholarship Edition, A Little to the Left, Rockstar Table Tennis, Dying Light: The Beast and more

tech_news.title: Buy Some 'Woke 2' Merch, Support A Worker-Owned Website - aftermath.site
tech_news.description: There's two shirts, a hoodie, a mug and a hat

tech_news.title: Fortnite Added Peak Skins That Cost Twice As Much As The Actual Indie Game - Kotaku
tech_news.description: Peak costs less than $10. Fortnite's Peak skin costs more than $20.

tech_news.title: Anthropic's Claude Can Now Control Your Computer - CNET
tech_news.description: The developer is boosting Claude's agentic capabilities in an apparent effort to compete with platforms like OpenClaw.

tech_news.title: MacBook Neo Silences Critics Over 8GB RAM Being Inadequate; Can Open 60 Apps In Unison While Windows Laptop Powers Off Performing The Same Task - Wccftech
tech_news.description: A YouTube channel decided to take the MacBook Neo for an apps stress test and opened up 60 apps at the same time to see if that 8GB RAM will be sufficient

tech_news.title: Nvidia CEO tries to explain why DLSS 5 isn’t just “AI slop” - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: If game makers don’t like it, “they could decide not to use it, you know?"

tech_news.title: iOS 26.4 offers two Liquid Glass customization updates - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: iOS 26.4 is launching soon, and it will bring two updates for how you can customize the Liquid Glass design on your iPhone.

tech_news.title: Someone has publicly leaked an exploit kit that can hack millions of iPhones - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Leaked "DarkSword" exploits published to GitHub allow hackers and cybercriminals to target iPhone users running old versions of iOS with spyware, according to cybersecurity researchers.

tech_news.title: Finishing a video game can trigger “post-game depression,” study finds - Dexerto
tech_news.description: Post-game depression is now being studied as a measurable phenomenon, with researchers identifying how finishing a video game can leave players feeling empty, reflective, and emotionally drained.
